name: Frozen Passion
recipeIngredient: 5 (12 oz) cans Carbonated Beverage, any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients in an ice cream freezer container and mix well.
2. Freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
3. Store leftovers in the freezer.
4. Alternatively, combine ingredients in a large bowl.
5. Turn into a 13 x 9 inch baking pan and freeze until firm, about 1 hour.
6. Break into pieces and turn back into the large mixing bowl.
7. Beat until smooth. Return to the pan.
8. Cover and freeze well.
